title: trollius farreri var. major
intro: Trollius farreri var. major, also known as the Sakhalin globeflower, is a perennial plant belonging to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine, and it is reported to have medicinal properties due to its alkaloid content, particularly isopegnin and bergapten, which have shown anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits associated with Trollius farreri var. major include its potential to reduce inflammation, treat skin conditions, and alleviate digestive issues. Trollius farreri var. major is often prepared as a tincture, infusion, or ointment, and is used in traditional herbal medicine to treat various ailments.
